# List of Acronyms {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

acronyms <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Acronym,        ~Category,         ~Definition,
  # ---- General & ATM ----
  "ANS",           "General",         "Air Navigation Services",
  "ANSP",          "General",         "Air Navigation Service Provider",
  "ASM",           "General",         "Airspace Management",
  "ATC",           "General",         "Air Traffic Control",
  "ATCO",          "General",         "Air Traffic Controller",
  "ATFM",          "General",         "Air Traffic Flow Management",
  "ATM",           "General",         "Air Traffic Management",
  "CDM",           "General",         "Collaborative Decision Making",
  "CDO",           "General",         "Continuous Descent Operations",
  "FIR",           "General",         "Flight Information Region",
  "FIS",           "General",         "Flight Information Service",
  "FMP",           "General",         "Flow Management Position",
  "GANP",          "General",         "Global Air Navigation Plan",
  "IFR",           "General",         "Instrument Flight Rules",
  "RNAV",          "General",         "Area Navigation",
  "RWY",           "General",         "Runway",
  "SES",           "General",         "Single European Sky",
  "SLOT",          "General",         "ATFM Slot / Departure Slot",
  "UTC",           "General",         "Coordinated Universal Time",
  "VMC",           "General",         "Visual Meteorological Conditions",
  "WTC",           "General",         "Wake Turbulence Category",
  "ACC",           "General",         "Area Control Centre",
  "APP",           "General",         "Approach Control Unit",
  "TWR",           "General",         "Aerodrome Control Tower",
  # ---- Performance ----
  "AOBT",          "Performance",     "Actual Off-Block Time",
  "ASMA",          "Performance",     "Arrival Sequencing and Metering Area",
  "HFE",           "Performance",     "Horizontal Flight Efficiency",
  "KPA",           "Performance",     "Key Performance Area",
  "KPI",           "Performance",     "Key Performance Indicator",
  "PLI",           "Performance",     "Planned Landing Interval",
  "PRR",           "Performance",     "Performance Review Report",
  "SIBT",          "Performance",     "Scheduled In-Block Time",
  "SOBT",          "Performance",     "Scheduled Off-Block Time",
  "TXIN",          "Performance",     "Taxi-In Time",
  "TXOT",          "Performance",     "Taxi-Out Time",
  "VFE",           "Performance",     "Vertical Flight Efficiency",
  # ---- Organisations ----
  "ANAC",          "Organisations",   "Agência Nacional de Aviação Civil (Brazilian Civil Aviation Authority)",
  "CAA",           "Organisations",   "Civil Aviation Authority",
  "CINDACTA",      "Organisations",   "Integrated Centre for Air Defence and Air Traffic Control (Brazil)",
  "CRCEA-SE",      "Organisations",   "Regional Centre of Southeast Airspace Control (Brazil)",
  "DECEA",         "Organisations",   "Departamento de Controle do Espaço Aéreo (Brazilian Airspace Control Department)",
  "ECAC",          "Organisations",   "European Civil Aviation Conference",
  "EUROCONTROL",   "Organisations",   "European Organisation for the Safety of Air Navigation",
  "FAA",           "Organisations",   "Federal Aviation Administration (United States)",
  "ICAO",          "Organisations",   "International Civil Aviation Organization",
  "INFRAERO",      "Organisations",   "Empresa Brasileira de Infraestrutura Aeroportuária",
  "JCAB",          "Organisations",   "Japan Civil Aviation Bureau",
  "NATO",          "Organisations",   "North Atlantic Treaty Organization",
  "NMOC",          "Organisations",   "Network Manager Operations Centre (EUROCONTROL)",
  "PBWG",          "Organisations",   "Performance Benchmarking Working Group",
  "PRC",           "Organisations",   "Performance Review Commission (EUROCONTROL)",
  "PRU",           "Organisations",   "Performance Review Unit (EUROCONTROL)",
  # ---- Brazil Airports ----
  "SBBR",          "Brazil Airports", "Brasília International Airport",
  "SBCF",          "Brazil Airports", "Belo Horizonte Confins International Airport",
  "SBCT",          "Brazil Airports", "Curitiba International Airport",
  "SBEG",          "Brazil Airports", "Eduardo Gomes International Airport (Manaus)",
  "SBGL",          "Brazil Airports", "Rio de Janeiro Galeão International Airport",
  "SBGR",          "Brazil Airports", "São Paulo Guarulhos International Airport",
  "SBKP",          "Brazil Airports", "Campinas Viracopos International Airport",
  "SBPA",          "Brazil Airports", "Porto Alegre International Airport",
  "SBRF",          "Brazil Airports", "Recife International Airport",
  "SBRJ",          "Brazil Airports", "Rio de Janeiro Santos Dumont Airport",
  "SBSP",          "Brazil Airports", "São Paulo Congonhas Airport",
  "SBSV",          "Brazil Airports", "Salvador International Airport",
  # ---- Europe Airports ----
  "EDDF",          "Europe Airports", "Frankfurt Airport (Germany)",
  "EDDM",          "Europe Airports", "Munich Airport (Germany)",
  "EGKK",          "Europe Airports", "London Gatwick Airport (United Kingdom)",
  "EGLL",          "Europe Airports", "London Heathrow Airport (United Kingdom)",
  "EHAM",          "Europe Airports", "Amsterdam Schiphol Airport (Netherlands)",
  "LEBL",          "Europe Airports", "Barcelona El Prat Airport (Spain)",
  "LEMD",          "Europe Airports", "Madrid Barajas Airport (Spain)",
  "LFPG",          "Europe Airports", "Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport (France)",
  "LGAV",          "Europe Airports", "Athens International Airport (Greece)",
  "LIRF",          "Europe Airports", "Rome Fiumicino Airport (Italy)",
  "LPPT",          "Europe Airports", "Lisbon Humberto Delgado Airport (Portugal)",
  "LSZH",          "Europe Airports", "Zurich Airport (Switzerland)",
  "LTFM",          "Europe Airports", "Istanbul Airport (Turkey)"
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Category = factor(Category, levels = c(
      "General", "Performance",
      "Organisations", "Systems",
      "Brazil Airports", "Europe Airports"
    ))
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Category, Acronym)

if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
  acronyms |>
    dplyr::select(Category, Acronym, Definition) |>
    dplyr::arrange(Category, Acronym) |>
    knitr::kable(
      format    = "latex",
      booktabs  = TRUE,
      longtable = TRUE,
      col.names = c("Category", "Acronym", "Definition"),
      linesep   = ""
    ) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("repeat_header"),
      font_size     = 10
    ) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, bold = TRUE, width = "3cm") |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(2, bold = TRUE, width = "2.5cm") |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(3, width = "10cm") |>
    kableExtra::collapse_rows(columns = 1, latex_hline = "major")

} else {
  acronyms |>
    dplyr::select(Category, Acronym, Definition) |>
    gt::gt(groupname_col = "Category") |>
    gt::cols_label(Acronym = "Acronym", Definition = "Definition") |>
    gt::cols_align(align = "left") |>
    gt::tab_style(
      style     = gt::cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = gt::cells_body(columns = Acronym)
    ) |>
    gt::opt_row_striping() |>
    gt::tab_options(
      table.width         = gt::pct(100),
      data_row.padding    = gt::px(4),
      table.font.size     = 12,
      row_group.font.size = 13
    )
}
```
